MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-31-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-06-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHILDS, JERARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 20 12TH STREET #336, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-04-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT VACATES BY NOON ON 8-4-96 & RETURNS KEYS TO HOTEL MGR, PLTF WILL EXEC STIP TO VACATE JUDGMNT & DISM W/PREJ IF PREPARED BY DEFT. NO FURTHER STAYS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
